name: verso
description: VERSO — The smartest way to maximize card rewards in Singapore

scripts.copy-www: mkdir -p www && cp index.html www/index.html && cp privacy.html www/privacy.html && cp sw.js www/sw.js && cp manifest.webmanifest www/manifest.webmanifest && cp makers-mark.png www/makers-mark.png && cp apple-touch-icon.png www/apple-touch-icon.png && cp apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png www/apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png && cp favicon.png www/favicon.png
scripts.build: npm run copy-www && npx cap copy android
scripts.build-ios: npm run copy-www && npx cap copy ios
scripts.add-android: npm run copy-www && npx cap add android
scripts.add-ios: npm run copy-www && npx cap add ios

author: Muneer Ahmed
